text_block_list.text: Tomorrow, our summer camp begins.

This training camp away from home is a perfect chance for runners to
focus and hone their abilities. However...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: A training camp by the beach... This'll be niiice.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Taking in the marine breeze as I fish in the sea... Drifting to sleep in
the sun with waves as my lullaby...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Mm-hm, we're gonna have so much fun! ♪

I rack my brain thinking of ways to get Sky to actually train during this
summer camp...

And by the time I come up with a plan, the sun is already shining
through my window.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Oooh, blue skies and blue seas!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: It's the perfect weather for fishing! We've gotta go surf fishing tod—

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Oh... Do we really have to train?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Fine, fine, have it your way... Hm? Wait, is this a special program?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Let's see here... "Use these hints to dig up buried treasure around the
beach..."

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
"If you can find all the treasure within the time limit, then you will be
rewarded with all-you-can-eat meals at the beachside clubhouse for
the rest of the camp..."

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
I get it! You're trying to rouse my adventurous spirit while also testing
how fast I can run!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
This training program combines both fun and exercise—it's hard to
argue with that.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Okay then, you've piqued my curiosity! I accept—let's do this training!

Sky agrees enthusiastically to my proposal, which means pulling an
all-nighter to plan this was worth it. Still...

The blazing rays of the sun are a bit harsh for the sleep-deprived. I
should make sure I stay hydrated, or I might actually collapse.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: ...Eeearth to Trainer. You've been spacing out a bit. Everything okay?
choice_data_list: Right as rain. Let's keep training.
Right as rain. Let's keep training.

text_block_list.text:
I read off the next hint, and Sky dashes off towards the beach once
more. See, she can do it if she tri—

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Whoaaa, Trainer?!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Hey now... You okay?!

I lose my balance, falling onto the sandy beach. The whole world
goes black...
Opening my eyes, I find myself lying on a couch in the lodge.
Last I remember, I was training on the beach with Sky...

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
...Hey, it's almost dinnertime, but Sei still hasn't come back, right?
Where did she go this time?

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text:
Well, she did say she was going to the beach for some fishing
earlier...

Looks like Sei is still out by the water. I decide to get up and go look
for her.
Outside, I see a familiar silhouette running along the shore.
Crunch, crunch...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Whew... I'd say I've outdone myself this time.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: But just in case, I'll do two—no, three more laps.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Wait, whoa! Trainer?!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Oh, um... glad you woke up. I don't know what I'd do if you never got
up again.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Still, the more you rest, the more I get to slack off. So it wasn't the
worst deal for me.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: I had a bunch of fun while you were out, you know.
She says that, but I notice specks of sand all over her tracksuit.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Those eyes of yours see right through me, don't they?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
It's true that I love slacking off, but even I know there's a time and
place for it.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
How should I put it... You worked yourself to the bone planning all
this for me, so I wanted to make good on it.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: If I'm not mistaken, and I rarely ever am... Did I... just level up again?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Da-dada-da-dada-daaah! ♪

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Yup, I knew it! Our bond just rose another level!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
I bet you were all like, "Wow! I'm so proud!" after seeing me train all
by myself, weren't you?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Wait, don't tell me that collapsing was part of your plan to get me
training of my own free will?!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Yikes, I'm getting chills! You may not look it, but you're a real crafty
one! Sheesh!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
...Though if we're talking about being crafty, then you and I are
partners in crime.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Haha, you think so too?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Then I guess I'll have to look forward to seeing more of your future
schemes.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Like, what if we caused a huge upset at the Twinkle Series? ...Just
kidding!

She says it's a joke... but the fierce determination welling up in her
eyes tells a very different story.
